mapper.select:
SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.PR_NO, R.PR_TITLE, R.PR_TYP, R.PURC_GRP_CD, R.REQ_DEPT_CD, R.REQ_USR_ID, R.OPER_ORG_CD, TO_CHAR(R.REQ_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.HOPE_DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HOPE_DLV_YMD, R.CURR_CD, R.TOT_AMT, R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(R.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM PR_REQUEST R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD = 'PR_STS' AND C.CD = R.STS AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE R.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (R.PR_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR R.PR_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND R.STS = #{sts}
ORDER BY R.ID DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.PR_NO, R.PR_TITLE, R.PR_TYP, R.PURC_GRP_CD, R.REQ_DEPT_CD, R.REQ_USR_ID, R.OPER_ORG_CD, TO_CHAR(R.REQ_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.HOPE_DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HOPE_DLV_YMD, R.CURR_CD, R.BUDGET_CD, BG.BUDGET_NM, R.TOT_AMT, R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REMARK, R.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(R.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM PR_REQUEST R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD = 'PR_STS' AND C.CD = R.STS AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN BG_BUDGET BG ON BG.COMP_CD = R.COMP_CD AND BG.BUDGET_CD = R.BUDGET_CD AND BG.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE R.ID = #{id} AND R.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT ID, REQUEST_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, NEW_ITEM_YN, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, EST_PRC, AMT, TO_CHAR(HOPE_DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HOPE_DLV_YMD, DLV_PLACE, REMARK FROM PR_ITEM WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PR_REQUEST (COMP_CD, PR_NO, PR_TITLE, PR_TYP, PURC_GRP_CD, REQ_DEPT_CD, REQ_USR_ID, OPER_ORG_CD, REQ_YMD, HOPE_DLV_YMD, CURR_CD, BUDGET_CD, TOT_AMT, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{prNo}, #{prTitle}, NVL(#{prTyp}, 'PRODUCT'), #{purcGrpCd}, #{reqDeptCd}, #{reqUsrId}, #{operOrgCd}, TO_DATE(#{reqYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{hopeDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{currCd}, 'KRW'), #{budgetCd}, NVL(#{totAmt}, 0), NVL(#{sts}, 'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PR_REQUEST SET PR_TITLE = #{prTitle}, PR_TYP = #{prTyp}, PURC_GRP_CD = #{purcGrpCd}, REQ_DEPT_CD = #{reqDeptCd}, OPER_ORG_CD = #{operOrgCd}, REQ_YMD = TO_DATE(#{reqYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), HOPE_DLV_YMD = TO_DATE(#{hopeDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CURR_CD = #{currCd}, BUDGET_CD = #{budgetCd}, TOT_AMT = #{totAmt}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PR_REQUEST SET STS = #{sts}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PR_REQUEST SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PR_ITEM (REQUEST_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, NEW_ITEM_YN, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, EST_PRC, AMT, HOPE_DLV_YMD, DLV_PLACE, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, NVL(#{newItemYn}, 'N'), #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty}, 0), NVL(#{estPrc}, 0), NVL(#{amt}, 0), TO_DATE(#{hopeDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{dlvPlace}, #{remark}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM')
